title: 10 best herbal teas for one side headache
description: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, teas helps with one side headache because of its natural anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The menthol content in peppermint helps to relax tense muscles, ease pain, and improve blood circulation, which can alleviate headache symptoms.
